application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided commensurate with educational qualification and experience.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. in Life Sciences / Biology / Biotechnology/ Botany / Science with minimum 1 year of relevant research experience.
qualification.details: Research Associate-II: Ph.D. in Life Sciences / Biology / Biotechnology/ Botany / Science. Minimum 1 year of relevant research experience. Candidates having research experience in the related field of work particularly research experience in Recombinant DNA techniques, molecular biology and Protein purification studies, BP-LR based cloning etc. will be preferred.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 61,000/- + 27% House Rent Allowance per month
salary_details.details: Rs. 61,000/- + 27% House Rent Allowance per month

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IISER Pune Research Associate-II Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IISER Pune to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Research Associate-II position at IISER Pune?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the Research Associate-II position at IISER Pune is 30th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Associate-II post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Ph.D. in Life Sciences, Biology, Biotechnology, Botany, or Science, along with at least one year of relevant research experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Research Associate-II recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Research Associate-II position is 35 years. Age relaxation may be provided based on qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate-II role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 61,000/- plus 27% House Rent Allowance per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Research Associate-II post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Research Associate-II position at IISER Pune.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for the Research Associate-II position must be submitted online through the official IISER Pune website.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Research Associate-II recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve shortlisting of candidates followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this post?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. What type of job is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This is a temporary and contractual position for the Research Associate-II role.

faq.question: Q10. Where is IISER Pune located?
faq.answer: IISER Pune is located in Pune, Maharashtra, with the pincode 411008.
